losses.message: Decoded 0 POINT carrier(s) verbatim from Parasolid POINT records (3×f64 big-endian, metres → millimetres), 100 analytic surface carrier(s) (100 plane, 0 cylinder, 0 cone, 0 sphere, 0 torus), and 0 analytic curve carrier(s) (0 line, 0 circle, 0 ellipse). All parameters are byte-exact at the document's millimetre scale.

This part is composed of 2 sub-body partition(s); its decoded feature-history Booleans do not resolve every intermediate body object to a partition image. Carriers from all sub-bodies are emitted without the unresolved composition that would remove interior/construction faces.

Material and appearance assignment, class-specific entity attribute fields, and assembly occurrence placements were not transferred: their remaining NX object-model and Parasolid field serialization is not decoded.

notes: SPLMSSTR container: version 0x06, file tag 0, footer offset 0, 2 directory entry/ies
embedded streams: 2 partition, 0 deltas, 0 plain (cached body), 0 preview/non-Parasolid
